85.reason: [Error: When list is not NULL, p = list->link may be NULL if list is the last node, causing a segmentation fault when accessing p->data. Also, the loop skips the first node (the dummy head) but prints from the second node, which is incorrect for the output format.]

Also, the loop skips the first node (the dummy head) but prints from the second node, which is incorrect for the output format.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  When list is the dummy head node, p becomes the first real node, but if list_ans has no real nodes (e.g., all terms canceled), p is NULL, causing a segmentation fault.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  p can be NULL when list is the last real node, causing segmentation fault.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  // runtime error: accessing p->data when p is NULL (no next node) because loop condition checks `list` but prints using `p` without ensuring p is not NULL
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Runtime Error: When list is the last node, p becomes NULL, and accessing p->data causes a segmentation fault. Also, it skips the head node's data if head is not a dummy, or prints garbage if head is dummy but logic is flawed for trailing nodes.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Runtime Error: When list is the last node, p becomes NULL. Accessing p->data.a causes a segmentation fault. The loop should check if p is NULL before accessing its data. Also, the first node is a dummy node with 0,0 which should likely be skipped or handled differently as it's not a real term.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  // Accessing p->data when p may be NULL (if list has only dummy node), causing runtime error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Dereferences p without checking if p is NULL, leading to segmentation fault when polynomial result is zero or empty]

34.reason: This skips the dummy head node, but if list_a has only one node (the dummy), pp becomes NULL immediately, causing a segmentation fault when accessing pp->data.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  This skips the dummy head node, but if list_a has only one node (the dummy), pp becomes NULL immediately, causing a segmentation fault when accessing pp->data.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Runtime Error: The loop condition checks pp->link != NULL, but pp is advanced to pp->link at the start of the loop body. If pp becomes NULL (end of list), accessing pp->link or pp->data in the next iteration or even the current one if not careful causes segfault. More critically, the inner loop logic is flawed for traversal. It should traverse while pp != NULL. Also, if list_a only has the dummy head, pp->link is NULL, so the inner loop doesn't execute, which might be correct for empty poly, but if pp becomes NULL inside, the next access crashes.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Skips the first real term if any, because list_a starts with dummy node; also, if only dummy exists, pp->link is NULL leading to dereference of NULL]
